product.title: Clinique Even Better Clinical Serum Full Coverage Hydrating Foundation Broad Spectrum SPF 25 With Vitamin C, Salicylic Acid + Hyaluronic Acid For Oily Skin Types

primaryFeatures.color: AM Cream Chamois CN 40 - very fair, cool-neutral undertones

featureBullets: SKINCARE-POWERED, FULL-COVERAGE FOUNDATION: Delivers 24 hours of full coverage with a satin matte finish in a range of color-true shades. Sweat and humidity resistant, with 24-hour defense against caking, settling, poring, and streaking.
LIQUID FOUNDATION WITH 3-SERUM TECHNOLOGY: UP302 + Vitamin C help visibly reduce dark spots. Salicylic acid helps re-texturize skin. Hyaluronic acid helps plump fine, dry lines.)
LIQUID FOUNDATION WITH SPF: SPF 25 helps protect skin from future discoloration.
CLINICAL EXPERTISE: Allergy tested. 100% fragrance free. Dermatologist tested. Ophthalmologist tested. Non-acnegenic.

BUILT ON DERMATOLOGICAL SCIENCE: As a dermatologist-guided brand, Clinique’s commitment to safety starts with skincare science. We partner with the best minds in dermatology and formulate for all skin types, tones, concerns—in service of all skin.

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this foundation effective and appreciate its coverage, with one noting it works well for uneven skin and redness. The product receives positive feedback for its smooth application that doesn't leave a sticky feeling, and customers like its natural look, with one describing it as airbrushed. They praise its longevity, saying it holds up well throughout the day, and consider it good value for money. The color match and texture receive mixed reviews - while some appreciate the wide shade range, others find it too dark, and while many like the smooth texture, some report it gets cakey.

reviews.reviewTitle: Flawless Coverage and Skincare Benefits Combined
reviews.reviewText: I recently started using the Clinique Even Better Clinical Serum Foundation Broad Spectrum SPF 25, and it has quickly become a staple in my daily beauty routine. Here’s why I highly recommend this foundation: Impressive Coverage: The foundation provides medium to full coverage that effectively conceals imperfections, redness, and uneven skin tone. It blends seamlessly into the skin, giving a natural, radiant finish that lasts all day. Skincare Benefits: What sets this foundation apart is its serum-like formulation that includes beneficial skincare ingredients. It contains vitamin C, salicylic acid, and hyaluronic acid, which help brighten the complexion, improve skin texture, and maintain hydration throughout the day. Broad Spectrum SPF 25: The added SPF 25 is a great bonus, offering protection against harmful UVA and UVB rays. It’s reassuring to know that my skin is protected from sun damage while looking flawless. Lightweight and Comfortable: Despite its excellent coverage, the foundation feels incredibly lightweight on the skin. It doesn’t feel heavy or cakey, even after hours of wear. It’s perfect for everyday use, providing comfort and breathability. Long-Lasting Wear: This foundation has impressive staying power. It holds up well throughout the day, resisting sweat and humidity. I rarely need to touch up, even on long days, which is a major plus. Wide Shade Range: Clinique offers a wide range of shades to suit various skin tones. Finding the perfect match for my complexion was easy, ensuring a seamless and natural look. Non-Irritating Formula: As someone with sensitive skin, I appreciate that this foundation is fragrance-free and non-comedogenic. It doesn’t cause any irritation or breakouts, making it suitable for all skin types, including sensitive and acne-prone skin. Buildable Coverage: The buildable formula allows me to customize the coverage based on my needs. For a more natural look, I apply a light layer, and for special occasions, I build it up for more coverage without it looking heavy. Packaging: The packaging is sleek and practical, with a pump dispenser that ensures easy and hygienic application. It also helps in controlling the amount of product dispensed, reducing waste. In summary, the Clinique Even Better Clinical Serum Foundation Broad Spectrum SPF 25 is an outstanding product that delivers both flawless coverage and skincare benefits. It’s lightweight, long-lasting, and protective, making it an excellent choice for anyone looking for a high-performance foundation. I highly recommend this foundation to anyone seeking a product that enhances their skin’s appearance while providing essential skincare benefits.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on June 7, 2024

productSpecs.color: AE Alabaster CN 10 - very fair, cool-neutral undertones

reviews.reviewText: Best foundation/bb cream for adult acne prone skin. I spray microbial toner before and after and my skin has never been better. The color matching is pretty close but not perfect, however the slight color difference is worth the effect. Coverage is excellent if you’re looking for a blurred natural look, can’t express that enough. Very natural look, moisturizing enough for my oily skin. You definitely need a finishing powder or else the makeup will rub off onto mugs, lids, sweaters, etc.

reviews.reviewTitle: Good product but a little drying for my skin.
reviews.reviewText: This is a quality product but I'm giving four stars because it doesn't totally work for my skin type. It has a very matte dry finish and I need a foundation that is more moisturizing. I love the color, coverage and staying power though.

reviews.reviewText: This makeup spreads smoothly, doesn’t look streaky, and does a fairly good job of covering reddish face blotches and brownish sun damage. I am in my 70s. I have tried drug store makeup and this makeup is worth the extra cost. I dot it all over my face and use a small sponge to spread it evenly.
